title: MOREEE APPLES!!!
description: just a mod that adds netherite and a diamond apple, nothing special. well balanced
body:
fun fact: after eating diamond apple you will get back 1 diamond!

diamond:
*absorbtion II - 2 minutes
*regeneration - 5 seconds
![diamond apple crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31c668b4f24839c936e7ff1ee53e3decbc80e177.jpeg)

netherite:
*absorbtion III - 2 minutes
*fire resistance - 2 minutes
*regeneration - 7 seconds
![Netherite apple crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3200a6e7ae33ff30923d1f586620092646d6690.jpeg)
